title: leptolobium tabacinum
intro: Leptolobium tabacinum, also known as Tabacilla or Brusón, is a flowering plant species belonging to the Fabaceae family. The plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine due to its medicinal properties, including antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties. Leptolobium tabacinum is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation and fighting off infections, as well as exhibiting potential effects in treating conditions like fever, cough, and skin problems. In terms of herbal preparations, the leaves and roots of the plant can be used to make teas, infusions, and topical applications.
